'''Kardek''' was one of the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] [[Council of Elders (Yinchorri)|Council of Elders]]. He first proposed a marital alliance between [[Vilmarh Grahrk]] and the [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]], specifically his daughter [[Vooma]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1998) 40|''Star Wars'' (1998) 40]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
